hops.context: The computational time of CCD systems
The computational time of CCD systems

question: In the context of using federated learning-based models for collaborative cyberattack detection, what is the primary metric used to measure the effectiveness of these systems?

options.A: The computational time required to detect and respond to cyber threats
options.B: The accuracy of identifying specific types of cyberattacks
options.C: The number of devices that can simultaneously participate in detection
options.D: The total cost of implementing the federated system across multiple networks

explanation: The primary metric used to measure the effectiveness of federated learning-based models applied to collaborative cyberattack detection is the computational time. This is because the effectiveness of the system in a real-time environment is critically dependent on how quickly it can process and respond to threats.
context: protection of federated learning-based models | The computational time of CCD systems | The computational time of CCD systems
